concerns.text: Spec FR-001 mandates ingesting the ILThermo dataset. Task T013 is marked [ ] (unimplemented) and explicitly notes the data is for 'structure extraction' but not validation. However, T016 (feature engineering) and T017b (unified dataset write) are also [ ] (unimplemented). Without these tasks completed, the unified dataset required by FR-001 and FR-002 cannot be produced, leaving the core data pipeline unimplemented.

Spec FR-001 and FR-002 require schema validation for the unified dataset and validation reports. Tasks T004a (ion_pair.schema.yaml) and T004b (validation_report.schema.yaml) are marked [ ] (unimplemented). The plan explicitly lists these as Phase 1 outputs required for 'Verified Accuracy' and 'Data Hygiene' enforcement. Their absence means the data pipeline lacks the necessary contract definitions to validate the unified dataset.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) requires verified URLs for external datasets. Task T009a (creating .env.example with SPICE_URL, IL_SAPT_URL, IL_THERMO_URL) is marked [ ] (unimplemented). Without this, the pipeline cannot deterministically fetch canonical data sources, violating the reproducibility requirement.

Spec FR-003, FR-004, and FR-008 require training three XGBoost models with Optuna tuning. Tasks T024 (train_hbond_model), T025a/b (Optuna objective/study), T026 (save_models), T027 (consistency check), and T028 (logging) are all marked [ ] (unimplemented). This leaves the core model training functionality (US2) incomplete.

Spec FR-005, FR-006, and FR-007 require ANOVA analysis and validation. Tasks T029-T038 (ANOVA, Tukey HSD, DFT validation, tautology check, reporting) are all marked [ ] (unimplemented). This leaves the systematic variation analysis and validation (US3) completely unimplemented.

Phase 6 (Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns) tasks T041-T045 are all marked [ ] (unimplemented). While some are optional, T041 (documentation updates) and T044 (unit tests) are critical for the 'Verified Accuracy' and 'Data Hygiene' principles. Their absence leaves the project without necessary documentation and test coverage.

Task T035b implements Spec FR-007 (experimental validation) but flags it as 'INVALID' per the Plan's decision to supersede FR-007 with DFT validation. The task description contradicts the Plan's explicit instruction to 'supersede' the experimental validation. This creates a logical contradiction in the execution flow and should be removed or re-tagged to reflect the Plan's DFT-only validation strategy.
